assignment.name: API Harvester
assignment.author: Logan Dapp
assignment.description: Python client functions (get_user, list_all_users, count_active, safe_get, merge_profiles) exercised against a deterministic in-process fake API through an injected fetch(path) -> (status, body) callable -- no real network traffic -- covering pagination, timeouts-in-spirit via retry limits, and idempotent-safe retries on 5xx only, never on 4xx.
